name: Exploding Kittens
description: Exploding Kittens is a Russian-roulette-style card game for 2-5 players. The deck is full of cute and absurd cards — laser pointers, hairy potato cats, defuses — except for the exploding kittens that knock you out of the round. Defuse cards save you; everything else helps you peek, skip, attack, or shuffle the deck to control who draws the boom.
